summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WM-Sauna AMO CRM Integration features. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all features: Admin 'Интеграции' tab with Telegram and AMO CRM sections, 4-step AMO CRM configuration wizard, manual ID inputs when not connected, correct Redirect URI display.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/admin/amocrm/status requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: GET /api/admin/amocrm/status returns connection status with auth (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/admin/amocrm/pipelines requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: GET /api/admin/amocrm/pipelines returns 400 'AMO CRM не настроен' when not configured
Backend: GET /api/admin/amocrm/users requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: GET /api/admin/amocrm/users returns 400 when not configured
Backend: GET /api/admin/amocrm/fields requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: GET /api/admin/amocrm/fields?entity=leads returns 400 when not configured
Backend: GET /api/admin/amocrm/fields?entity=contacts returns 400 when not configured
Backend: POST /api/admin/test-amocrm requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: POST /api/admin/test-amocrm returns 400 when not configured
Backend: GET /api/admin/settings/integrations requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: GET /api/admin/settings/integrations returns all integration fields with auth (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings/integrations requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings/integrations saves settings correctly with auth (200 OK)
Backend: Admin login with correct credentials succeeds (200 OK)
Backend: Admin login with wrong credentials fails (401)
Frontend: Admin panel login works correctly
Frontend: 'Интеграции' tab renders correctly in sidebar
Frontend: Telegram section displays with bot token and chat ID inputs
Frontend: Telegram 'Отправить тестовое сообщение' button present
Frontend: AMO CRM section displays with 'Выключено' toggle
Frontend: Step 1 'Данные интеграции' shows Redirect URI, Domain, Client ID, Client Secret fields
Frontend: Redirect URI shows correct callback URL: https://media-optimize-2.preview.emergentagent.com/api/admin/amocrm/callback
Frontend: 'Копировать' button present for Redirect URI
Frontend: Step 2 'Авторизация' shows 'Авторизовать в AMO CRM' button (disabled when domain/client_id empty)
Frontend: Step 2 shows 'Проверить подключение' button (disabled when no token)
Frontend: Step 3 'Воронка и этап' shows manual ID inputs (Pipeline ID, Status ID, Responsible User ID)
Frontend: Step 4 'Маппинг полей' shows 6 manual field ID inputs (Имя клиента, Телефон, Email, Модель сауны, Стоимость, Комментарий)
Frontend: 'Сохранить' button present for saving integration settings
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing integration settings
context_for_next_testing_agent: AMO CRM integration endpoints are fully functional. Since no real AMO CRM account is connected, all data endpoints (pipelines, users, fields) correctly return 400 errors with appropriate Russian error messages. The frontend admin panel 'Интеграции' tab shows a 4-step wizard for AMO CRM configuration: 1) Integration data (Redirect URI, Domain, Client ID, Client Secret), 2) Authorization (OAuth button disabled until domain/client_id filled), 3) Pipeline and Stage (manual ID inputs when not connected), 4) Field Mapping (6 manual field ID inputs). The Telegram section is also present with bot token, chat ID inputs, and test message button. All admin endpoints require Basic Auth (admin:220066).

amocrm_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/admin/amocrm/status returns {connected: bool, has_token: bool, expired: bool, domain: string}. Requires Basic Auth.

amocrm_pipelines_endpoint.details: GET /api/admin/amocrm/pipelines returns 400 with 'AMO CRM не настроен' or 'Нет валидного токена' when not configured. Requires Basic Auth.

amocrm_users_endpoint.details: GET /api/admin/amocrm/users returns 400 when not configured. Requires Basic Auth.

amocrm_fields_endpoint.details: GET /api/admin/amocrm/fields?entity=leads|contacts returns 400 when not configured. Requires Basic Auth.

test_amocrm_endpoint.details: POST /api/admin/test-amocrm returns 400 with 'AMO CRM не настроен. Сначала пройдите авторизацию.' when not configured. Requires Basic Auth.

integration_settings_endpoint.details: GET/PUT /api/admin/settings/integrations returns/saves all Telegram and AMO CRM settings. Requires Basic Auth.

frontend_integrations_tab.details: Admin panel 'Интеграции' tab shows Telegram section and AMO CRM 4-step wizard. All UI elements render correctly.

amocrm_oauth_flow.details: OAuth flow requires real AMO CRM account. Callback endpoint exists at /api/admin/amocrm/callback.
